===================
=== Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
I recieved this show from a snail mail trade in 2002 as audio discs without any taper info ... trader advertised as  > Berlin Arena 11 April 2002 - Live Experience / LE 500204 <  but i have have no way of knowing if that is what this is ... that's about it!

Bob Dylan - 2002-04-11 Berlin, Germany

Lineage: audio cd-r's -> EAC (Secure, Offset Correct) ->  WAV -> TLH-FLAC (8)

disc 1
1 intro 
2 I Am The Man, Thomas 
3 The Times They Are A-Changin' 
4 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) 
5 Boots Of Spanish Leather  
6 Solid Rock 
7 Moonlight 
8 Lonesome Day Blues
9 All Along The Watchtower 
10 Visions Of Johanna  
11 Masters Of War 
12 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right 
   74:20.47

disc 2
1 Love Sick 
2 Summer Days 
3 The Wicked Messenger 
4 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat 
5 Not Fade Away 
6 Like A Rolling Stone 
7 Knockin' On Heaven's Door
8 Honest With Me 
9 Blowin' In The Wind 
10 Highway 61 Revisited 
   74:14.12
